title: Tragacantha strigulosa
taxonomy: Tragacantha strigulosa is a species of plant in the Fabaceae family. It belongs to the subfamily Faboideae and tribe Astragaleae. The genus Tragacantha is a synonym for Astragalus, so Tragacantha strigulosa is also known as Astragalus strigulosus. This classification indicates the plant's relationship to other legumes. Further research may provide more specific details about its classification within the plant kingdom.
